feature: Enterprise Agent Platform Sprint 5: VS Code Agent Teams, Remote Control, Smart Hub API

tasks.title: VS Code Agent Teams presets — review, feature, debug teams
tasks.description: Create agents/teams/ directory with team preset JSON configs for VS Code integration. Each preset defines agent composition, model tiers, tool permissions, and workflow steps.
acceptance_criteria: agents/teams/ directory created with review.json, feature.json, debug.json
Each preset has: name, description, agents (with roles), workflow steps, model_tier
Agent references match catalog.json agent names
README.md explains the preset format, how to use in VS Code, and how to create custom presets
Presets reference existing agents from agents/core/ — no new agents invented

tasks.title: Remote Control documentation
tasks.description: Create docs/remote-control.md documenting the full remote control architecture.
acceptance_criteria: Documents Telegram dispatch system (tiers, routing, safety)
Documents cron scheduling via /telegram-cron
Documents parallel session management (/telegram-parallel, screen sessions)
Documents Ghost Mode remote triggering and notification flow
Includes architecture diagram (mermaid) showing message flow
References existing commands and config files with correct paths

tasks.title: Worktree isolation documentation
tasks.description: Create docs/worktree-isolation.md documenting the git worktree isolation pattern for parallel agent execution.
acceptance_criteria: Explains git worktree concept and why it enables parallel agent execution
Documents the isolation: worktree parameter in Agent tool
Covers merge strategies: auto-merge, conflict resolution, sequential fallback
Documents cleanup: automatic cleanup on no changes, manual cleanup commands
Includes decision matrix: when to use worktree vs sequential execution
References Claude Code's built-in worktree support

tasks.title: URI handler integration documentation
tasks.description: Create docs/uri-handler.md documenting claude:// URI scheme for VS Code deep linking.
acceptance_criteria: Defines claude:// URI scheme with path patterns for commands, tasks, agents
Documents URI examples: claude://command/plan, claude://task/3, claude://agent/verifier
Explains VS Code URI handler registration pattern
Covers security: URI validation, allowlisted paths, no arbitrary command execution
Includes integration with Smart Hub (clickable links in dashboard)

tasks.title: Smart Hub web API spec — pipeline, tasks, metrics
tasks.description: Create docs/smart-hub/api-spec.md with OpenAPI-style endpoint definitions for the Smart Hub web interface.
acceptance_criteria: OpenAPI 3.1-style endpoint definitions (not full YAML, readable markdown)
GET /api/pipeline/status — returns current pipeline state, phase, progress
GET /api/tasks — returns tasks.json contents with filtering/sorting
GET /api/metrics — returns metrics.jsonl aggregated data
GET /api/agents — returns catalog.json agent list with team membership
POST /api/commands/{name}/run — trigger a command execution
Each endpoint has: path, method, request params, response schema, example response
References Smart Hub design-doc.md Tauri IPC contracts

tasks.title: Enhance verifier agent with team preset awareness
tasks.description: Update agents/core/verifier.md to add team preset verification capabilities.
acceptance_criteria: Adds 'Team Preset Verification' section to verifier.md
Verifier can validate team preset JSON against catalog.json
Checks: all agents in preset exist in catalog, model tiers are valid, no circular dependencies
Preserves all existing verifier functionality (acceptance criteria, diff, regressions)
Updated invoked_by to include /team-build

tasks.title: Update AGENTS.md + catalog.json for Sprint 5
tasks.description: Add Sprint 5 sections to AGENTS.md. Update catalog.json with new team presets.
acceptance_criteria: AGENTS.md has 'VS Code Agent Teams (Sprint 5)' section
AGENTS.md has 'Remote Control Architecture (Sprint 5)' section
AGENTS.md has 'Smart Hub API (Sprint 5)' section
catalog.json has feature and debug team definitions
All new entries reference correct file paths
